name: build_wall_2x2
description: Build 2x2 oak plank wall at midpoint for cover and defense

name: build_2x2_wall
description: Build a 2x2 wall of oak planks at current position for cover

name: attack_nearest_hostile
description: Attack the nearest hostile mob using equipped weapon (sword/melee or bow/ranged)

name: move_to_midpoint
description: Move to midpoint coordinate (x:0.5/1.5, y:0, z:0.5) to regroup
parameters: z.object({ x: z.number().describe("The target x coordinate for regrouping"), y: z.number().describe("The target y coordinate for regrouping"), z: z.number().describe("The target z coordinate for regrouping"), radius: z.number().describe("The acceptable distance from the coordinate to consider the task complete") })

name: drop_bread_nearby
description: Drop a bread item at current location for teammates
parameters: z.object({ itemName: z.string().describe("The item to drop, for example 'bread'"), count: z.number().int().positive().describe("The number of items to drop") })
